title: Violation; suit for damages
doc_html:
§666.  Violation; suit for damages

In addition to the other penalties provided in this Part, any person who is injured in his business or property by any violation of this Part, may proceed against the one committing the violation to recover the damages sustained and the costs of suit.
doc_text:
§666.  Violation; suit for damages
In addition to the other penalties provided in this Part, any person who is injured in his business or property by any violation of this Part, may proceed against the one committing the violation to recover the damages sustained and the costs of suit.
